description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pytest CI with read-only repository permissions that runs on a schedule and can be manually dispatched. The workflow uses an ubuntu-22.04 job matrix to test with Python versions 3.7 through 3.13. For each Python version, it checks out the repository, sets up the corresponding Python version, upgrades pip, installs test requirements in the huaweicloud-sdk-core directory, and runs a custom test command specified in the CI_CMD variable.
